description: Verso: Inventory (thabt al-ḥawāʾij). In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100–1138 CE). "Date not recorded. Items are listed in two columns. Probably an appendix of an estate of a deceased. There are 5 lines that divide the list into 6 sections. The list comprises items such as: a lamp (manāra) (l. 5) a ring (khātam) (l. 17), precious stones such as corals (ʿaqīq), stones (ḥijr), pearls (luʾluʾ) (ll. 21–22), and many others. This document was not signed." (Information from Gershon Weiss.)
description_he: גב: מלאי (ת'בת אל-חוואיג') בכתב ידו של חלפון בן מנשה (פעיל 1100-1138 לסה'נ). פריטים בשתי עמודות, כנראה נספח לעיזבון נפטר. כולל: מנורה, טבעת, אבני חן, אלמוגים, פנינים ועוד.
